scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run demo:serve
scripts.build:core: microbundle build --entry src/store-locator.ts --format modern,esm,cjs,umd --compress false --sourcemap false --no-generateTypes
scripts.build:react:cjs: microbundle build --entry src/react.ts --output dist/react.js --format cjs --compress false --sourcemap false --no-generateTypes --pkg-main false
scripts.build:react:esm: microbundle build --entry src/react.ts --output dist/react.esm.js --format esm --compress false --sourcemap false --no-generateTypes --pkg-main false
scripts.build:react:modern: microbundle build --entry src/react.ts --output dist/react.modern.mjs --format modern --compress false --sourcemap false --no-generateTypes --pkg-main false
scripts.build:react:umd: microbundle build --entry src/react.ts --output dist/react.umd.js --format umd --name StoreLocatorReact --globals react=React,leaflet=L --compress false --sourcemap false --no-generateTypes --pkg-main false
scripts.build:react: npm run build:react:cjs && npm run build:react:esm && npm run build:react:modern && npm run build:react:umd
scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:core && npm run build:react && npm run build:types
scripts.watch: microbundle watch --entry src/store-locator.ts --format modern,esm,cjs,umd --compress false --sourcemap false --no-generateTypes
scripts.refresh: npm run clean; npm run init
